positive: A stylized minimalist depiction of serene mountain forest flora, featuring large, intricate silhouettes of stylized fern fronds, eucalyptus leaves, and gentle meandering woodland paths. The composition is centrally focused and circular, designed for seamless apparel printing. Utilize a sophisticated, limited color palette of deep sage green, muted terracotta, and creamy off-white. The style should mimic clean linework woodcut etching blended with modern botanical illustration, emphasizing high contrast and clear separation between subject and background. Crisp, perfect symmetry, vector art quality, designed for DTG printing.
negative: blur, out of focus, artifact, noise, grain, signature, watermark, text, messy, cluttered, abstract art, photorealism, gradient, low contrast, bad composition, logo, brand, copyrighted character
